notes: Daily wordplay draft 2026-07-09. Mechanics: before_after (5) + hidden_word (5). Rotation check: last committed packs used homophone+initials (2026-07-05); before_after and hidden_word not used in any open PR. B&A pivots are all coincidental shared words between conceptually unrelated phrases; splice answers are not real standalone terms. Hidden-word clues are scenes that do not define the hidden animal answer; carrier words are ordinary and unrelated to the answer.
